metadata.intent: Count the total number of unique customers in the system.
metadata.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT businessPartner) AS number_of_customers FROM business_partners;

metadata.intent: Identify the sales order with the highest total net amount.
metadata.sql: SELECT salesOrder, totalNetAmount FROM sales_order_headers ORDER BY totalNetAmount DESC LIMIT 1;
